text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Manhattan Cafe doesn't look too good, so I let
her rest in the infirmary.

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text:
Sorry for making you worry... I'll try to recover as
quickly as I can.

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text: See you...

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text: Is this... a dream?

You have brought shadow to the skies! Welcome
and goodnight, Manhattan Cafe!

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text: ...Who are you?

I am what you draw. Or maybe a snippet of film?
The moon dreamt up by a deep-sea fish! Or
perhaps the obsidian horizon...

text_block_list.name: Wonder
text_block_list.text:
I am a spark of light plucked from the sky... Call
me Wonder! Guten tag? Arche! Record!

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text:
Okay, then... Wonder it is. There really is
something quite... unique about you.

text_block_list.name: Wonder
text_block_list.text:
In place of a feast this evening, shall I share with
you a song of prayer sung in secret by pods of
whales?

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text: ...Is there something you want to tell me?

text_block_list.name: Wonder
text_block_list.text:
The halo of your eyes is as sweet poison... Its
nectar whispers forth the silhouette of the night...
And from its shadows, we are born.

text_block_list.name: Wonder
text_block_list.text:
On a canvas of black, tomorrow, and in summer
too, I hope... Speak, and caress them with
compassion, and bestow upon them a name.

text_block_list.name: Wonder
text_block_list.text:
We are footsteps. A sudden spell of rain. The
urge to look over your shoulder. The weaving of
words. The tender template of a clear day.

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text: It is I who am in your debt.

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text:
Thanks to all of you... I don't have to feel alone in
this world...

text_block_list.name: Wonder
text_block_list.text:
Let us offer a bouquet of baby's breath to the
wizened rats! And let distant thunder rumble with
all its might through a voicepipe to the stars!

text_block_list.name: Wonder
text_block_list.text:
Manhattan Cafe. The eye that was sewn shut will
open. The new moon is finished...

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text: ...What a strange dream.

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text: Hehe. But for some reason, my body feels light...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
After waking from her indescribable dream,
Manhattan Cafe leaves the infirmary feeling
fulfilled both physically and mentally.

text_block_list.name: Wonder
text_block_list.text:
Your legs are the hammers to smash hearts on the
staircase... Where is the window? There isn't one.
For here is sugar. You deserve the sea of night,
boiled and bleary.

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text: Huh?

text_block_list.name: Wonder
text_block_list.text:
Step forth, to the park of blackened sand. Send
the golden binary star of the thawing forest to
the guillotine.

text_block_list.name: Wonder
text_block_list.text:
Hither, come this way. Sit over there. Peer into
the well as you chip away at the canvas.

text_block_list.name: Wonder
text_block_list.text:
Look how you can chip it away. See it, smell it.
Trace your finger across the barrier, and watch it
melt away.

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text:
Ngh, no, that's wrong. I... don't want to go over
there!

text_block_list.name: Wonder
text_block_list.text:
A door in the mirror, a chair of chains, a labyrinth
of flesh, a crown of solitude. The starving lady
jests as she licks the eyes off the headless cat!

text_block_list.name: Cacophony of Voices
text_block_list.text:
Peelitawaypeelitawaypeelitwaypeelitaw aypeelit
awaypeelitwaypeelitaway...

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text: Someone...

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text: ...Ngh.

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text: ...What a terrible dream.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Manhattan Cafe's nightmare keeps her from
getting a good night's rest...
